infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: The app accesses your photo library to let you share photos with your friends.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: The app accesses your camera to let you take photos and share them with your friends.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: We need your location to show where the animal was found and to allow people to contact the person responsible for the animal.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: We need your location to show where the animal was found and to allow people to contact the person responsible for the animal.

plugins.photosPermission: The app accesses your photos to let you share them with your friends.
plugins.cameraPermission: The app accesses your camera to let you take photos and share them with your friends.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: We need your location to show where the animal was found and to allow people to contact the person responsible for the animal.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: We need your location to show where the animal was found and to allow people to contact the person responsible for the animal.
